notes: Alaska has no state personal income tax.
California 1–12.3% + 1% Mental Health Services surcharge above $1M (top effective 13.3% / 14.4% with 1.1% SDI).
Florida has no state personal income tax.
Georgia flat 5.39% in 2025; scheduled to drop toward 4.99%.
Iowa flat 3.80% in 2025 (HF 2317 transition; previously progressive).
Indiana flat 3.00% in 2025 (dropping per HB 1001 schedule). Counties add separately — see payroll_local_income_tax.
Massachusetts 5% flat + 4% surtax on income > $1M = top 9%.
Maryland state 2–5.75%; counties add piggyback rates (see payroll_local_income_tax).
Mississippi flat 4.7% in 2025 (transitioning to lower rates).
Montana top marginal 5.9% (two-bracket structure as of 2024).
North Carolina flat 4.5% in 2025 (dropping to 4.25% in 2026).
Nebraska top marginal 5.20% in 2025 (LB 873 transition toward flat 3.99%).
New Hampshire's Interest & Dividends Tax was repealed effective 2025; no state wage tax.
Nevada has no state personal income tax.
New York top marginal 10.9% (millionaires' tax). NYC and Yonkers add separately — see payroll_local_income_tax.
Ohio top marginal 3.5% (recent reductions). Municipalities add separately — see payroll_local_income_tax (Phase 3).
Pennsylvania flat 3.07% (long-standing). Local EIT/LST add separately — see payroll_local_income_tax.
South Carolina top marginal 6.2% in 2025 (reduced from 7%).
South Dakota has no state personal income tax.
Tennessee has no state personal income tax (Hall tax repealed 2021).
Texas has no state personal income tax.
Washington has no state personal income tax (capital-gains tax only).
West Virginia top marginal 4.82% in 2025 (reduced from 6.5%).
Wyoming has no state personal income tax.
